purpose: Governance reference for which strategies are eligible by regime, including Tier-2 incubation cohorts.
_change_v4: max_fused raised 0.98→1.0 across BREAKOUT/VOLATILITY_EXPANSION/TRENDING_STRONG/RANGING_LOW_VOL/RANGING_HIGH_NOISE. entry_governor uses strict > comparison so 0.98 was hard-blocking all fused=1.00 signals (ML ensemble's highest-conviction output). Run H achieved 53.1% WR despite this — removing cap will allow best signals through.

XAUUSD.notes: Gold is treated as macro metals instrument; inactivity is correct by default.

USOIL.notes: Energy trends hard; exclude mean-reversion strategies (VRPH, SMRF).

UKOIL.notes: Energy trends hard; exclude mean-reversion strategies (VRPH, SMRF).

HEATOIL.notes: Illiquid energy instrument; trend-following only, highest confidence bar.

JP225.notes: Nikkei 225; session open fakeouts make FBMR valuable alongside trend strategies.

US100.notes: NASDAQ 100; NY session open fakeouts make FBMR valuable alongside trend strategies.

HK50.notes: Hang Seng; low liquidity, conservative participation only.

UK100.notes: FTSE 100; London open fakeouts make FBMR valuable alongside trend strategies.

XAGUSD.notes: Silver; correlated with XAUUSD. Added BRC/VCE for BREAKOUT regime coverage. VRPH eligible unlike oil due to mean-reverting macro spikes.

BTCUSD.notes: Bitcoin; high-volatility crypto trending instrument. Exclude mean-reversion strategies (VRPH, SMRF). ML_ENSEMBLE primary signal source.

ETHUSD.notes: Ethereum; correlated with BTCUSD. High-volatility crypto trending instrument. Exclude mean-reversion strategies (VRPH, SMRF). ML_ENSEMBLE primary signal source.

BREAKOUT.notes: Breakout continuation and volatility expansion strategies. TEF for late-cycle exhaustion.

VOLATILITY_EXPANSION.notes: Prefer expansion/continuation engines; TEF added for trend-exhaustion fade trades in volatile breakouts.

POST_EVENT_NORMALIZATION.notes: Normalization phase supports non-directional vol and micro-liquidity tactics.

TRENDING_STRONG.notes: Continuation dominates; TEF only as conditional late-cycle participation.

TRENDING_WEAK_OR_TRANSITIONAL.notes: Transitional trends require caution; FCD added 2026-06-22 because signals were being tagged FCD in weak-trend regimes and hard-blocked by the eligibility matrix.

RANGING_LOW_VOL.notes: Directional conviction low; prefer reversion and relative-value profiles. STD added 2026-05-12: session-transition drift suits low-vol ranging; was blocking XAUUSD and other STD signals with STRATEGY_REGIME_MISMATCH.

RANGING_HIGH_NOISE.notes: Noisy sideways regime favors conservative, low-exposure deployments.

THIN_LIQUIDITY.notes: Participation should be sparse; liquidity engine only if execution quality is stable.

MACRO_REPRICING_OR_CRISIS.notes: Flat posture is valid. Allow existing risk governor to enforce minimum activity.

MACRO_POST_RELEASE_DRIFT.notes: Tier-2 event strategy; seek delayed flow persistence, not headline reaction.

FIX_WINDOW_FLOW_DISTORTION.notes: Tier-2 flow strategy; activation only around rebalance/fix distortion windows.

CROSS_ASSET_STRESS_TRANSFER.notes: Tier-2 macro strategy; requires coordinated cross-asset confirmation.

WEEKEND_GAP_RECONCILIATION.notes: Tier-2 episodic strategy; low-frequency Monday/open-window participation only.

FUNDING_BASIS_DISLOCATION.notes: Tier-2 basis strategy; avoid participation when shifts appear structural.

CORRELATION_BREAK_PERSISTENCE.notes: Tier-2 persistence strategy; only valid when decoupling remains durable.

GOLD_MACRO_STRESS_EXPRESSION.notes: Gold-specific macro stress expression regime; conservative and rare activation intent.

GOLD_VOLATILITY_NORMALIZATION.notes: Gold-specific volatility normalization regime; non-participation is expected when confirmation is weak.
